entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY

entities.name: ADAPTABILITY

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SIGNIFICANCE

entities.description: Farming practices that are environmentally sound and economically viable

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES

entities.description: The variety of food preparation and consumption styles
